BUU-KI_POWER.title: Ki
BUU-KI_WELL_POWER.title: Ki Well
BUU-KI_WELL_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [pink]Ki[/pink] equal to this power's amount.
BUU-MAJIN_FURY_POWER.title: Majin Fury
BUU-MAJIN_FURY_POWER.description: When you enter Majin stance, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-SUPER_SPIRIT_POWER.title: Super Spirit
BUU-SUPER_SPIRIT_POWER.description: When you enter Super stance, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-REGENERATIVE_FORM_POWER.title: Regenerative Form
BUU-REGENERATIVE_FORM_POWER.description: At end of turn in Regular stance, gain [pink]Ki[/pink] equal to this power's amount.
BUU-REGENERATIVE_FORM_POWER.smartDescrip: End of turn in Regular: gain [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-CANDY_CHORUS_POWER.title: Candy Chorus
BUU-CANDY_CHORUS_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw cards.
BUU-KI_SURGE_POWER.title: Ki Surge
BUU-KI_SURGE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [pink]Ki[/pink] and draw.
BUU-MAJIN_DRAW_POWER.title: Majin Draw
BUU-MAJIN_DRAW_POWER.description: When you enter Majin stance, draw 2 cards per stack.
BUU-BUU_STUDY_POWER.title: Buu Study
BUU-BUU_RITUAL_POWER.title: Buu Ritual
BUU-BUU_RITUAL_POWER.description: At end of turn, gain [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to this power's amount.
BUU-BUU_PLATING_POWER.title: Buu Plating
BUU-BUU_PLATING_POWER.description: At end of turn, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] per stack. At start of turn, lose 1 stack.
BUU-BUU_PLATING_POWER.smartDescription: End of turn: Block. Start of turn: lose 1.
BUU-BUU_REGEN_POWER.title: Buu Regen
BUU-BUU_REGEN_POWER.description: At end of turn, heal HP equal to this power's amount. At start of turn, lose 1 stack.
BUU-BUU_REGEN_POWER.smartDescription: End of turn: heal. Start of turn: lose 1.
BUU-STANCE_GUARD_POWER.title: Stance Guard
BUU-STANCE_GUARD_POWER.description: When you change stance, gain 4 Block per stack.
BUU-CALM_BLOCK_POWER.title: Calm Block
BUU-CALM_BLOCK_POWER.description: At end of turn in Regular stance, gain 5 Block per stack.
BUU-CALM_BLOCK_POWER.smartDescription: End of turn in Regular: Block.
BUU-CALM_AURA_POWER.title: Calm Aura
BUU-CALM_AURA_POWER.description: At end of turn in Regular stance, gain 3 Block per stack.
BUU-CALM_AURA_POWER.smartDescription: End of turn in Regular: Block.
BUU-BLOCK_TO_KI_POWER.title: Block to Ki
BUU-PINK_WAVE_POWER.title: Pink Wave
BUU-PINK_WAVE_POWER.description: At end of turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy per stack.
BUU-RAGE_POWER.title: Rage
BUU-RAGE_POWER.description: When you receive attack damage, gain Strength.
BUU-OMEGA_POWER.title: Omega
BUU-OMEGA_POWER.description: At end of turn, deal damage to ALL enemies.
BUU-STANCE_DUALITY_POWER.title: Stance Duality
BUU-STANCE_DUALITY_POWER.description: When you change stance, gain Block and [pink]Ki[/pink].
BUU-BUU_FORESIGHT_POWER.title: Buu Foresight
BUU-BUU_FORESIGHT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw additional cards.
BUU-RETAINED_KI_POWER.title: Retained Ki
BUU-RETAINED_KI_POWER.description: Retained cards cost 1 less this combat.
BUU-BUU_FASTING_POWER.title: Buu Fasting
BUU-BUU_FASTING_POWER.description: At start of turn gain Strength and Dexterity. Lose 1 Energy.
BUU-REGULAR_FORM_POWER.title: Regular Form
BUU-REGULAR_FORM_POWER.description: When you enter Regular stance, gain 4 Block per stack.
BUU-BLASPHEMER_POWER.title: Blasphemer
BUU-BLASPHEMER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, deal 4 damage to a random enemy per stack.
BUU-BUU_DEVA_POWER.title: Buu Deva
BUU-BUU_DEVA_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain Energy.
BUU-MASTER_REALITY_POWER.title: Master Reality
BUU-MASTER_REALITY_POWER.description: At end of turn, gain 2 [pink]Ki[/pink] per stack.
BUU-MARK_POWER.title: Mark
BUU-MARK_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply Weak to a random enemy.
BUU-REGULAR_STANCE.title: Regular
BUU-MAJIN_STANCE.title: Majin
BUU-SUPER_STANCE.title: Super
BUU-SUPER_STANCE.description: Deal triple damage. Exit at end of turn.
